title: podman-remote artifact push does not use --authfile value
body:
### Issue Description

Using `podman-remote` from within a Toolbx container, I am unable to push OCI artifacts to an image registry that I have known-good credentials for. It appears that podman-remote is not respecting the `--authfile` flag as seen in the expected results section. I believe that only `podman-remote` is affected by this because whenever I run the same command directly on my host, it succeeds.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue:
1. `podman artifact add quay.io/zzlotnik/testing:artifact ./hello.txt`
2. `podman artifact --push /path/to/authfile quay.io/zzlotnik/testing:artifact`

(Note: These commands are being run in a Toolbx container with `podman-remote` aliased to `podman`.)

### Describe the results you received

I get an unauthorized error message like this:

```
$ podman artifact push --authfile "/path/to/authfile" quay.io/zzlotnik/testing:artifact
Error: writing manifest: uploading manifest artifact to quay.io/zzlotnik/testing: unauthorized: access to the requested resource is not authorized
```

Running the same command again with `--log-level=trace` suggests that it never considers the value from the `--authfile` flag or the `REGISTRY_AUTH_FILE` env var:
```
$ podman --log-level=trace artifact push --authfile "$HOME/path/to/authfile" quay.io/zzlotnik/testing:artifact
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level trace
DEBU[0000] Called push.PersistentPreRunE(podman --log-level=trace artifact push --authfile /home/zzlotnik/path/to/authfile quay.io/zzlotnik/testing:artifact)
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: GET URI: http://d/v5.6.2/libpod/_ping
DEBU[0000] Loading registries configuration "/etc/containers/registries.conf"
DEBU[0000] Loading registries configuration "/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf"
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching cloud.openshift.com found in /run/user/4201110/containers/auth.json
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching cloud.openshift.com found in /home/zzlotnik/.config/containers/auth.json
DEBU[0000] Found credentials for cloud.openshift.com in credential helper containers-auth.json in file /home/zzlotnik/.docker/config.json
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching quay.io found in /run/user/4201110/containers/auth.json
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching quay.io found in /home/zzlotnik/.config/containers/auth.json
DEBU[0000] Found credentials for quay.io in credential helper containers-auth.json in file /home/zzlotnik/.docker/config.json
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching registry.build03.ci.openshift.org found in /run/user/4201110/containers/auth.json
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching registry.build03.ci.openshift.org found in /home/zzlotnik/.config/containers/auth.json
DEBU[0000] Found credentials for registry.build03.ci.openshift.org in credential helper containers-auth.json in file /home/zzlotnik/.docker/config.json
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching registry.ci.openshift.org found in /run/user/4201110/containers/auth.json
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching registry.ci.openshift.org found in /home/zzlotnik/.config/containers/auth.json
DEBU[0000] Found credentials for registry.ci.openshift.org in credential helper containers-auth.json in file /home/zzlotnik/.docker/config.json
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching registry.connect.redhat.com found in /run/user/4201110/containers/auth.json
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching registry.connect.redhat.com found in /home/zzlotnik/.config/containers/auth.json
DEBU[0000] Found credentials for registry.connect.redhat.com in credential helper containers-auth.json in file /home/zzlotnik/.docker/config.json
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching registry.redhat.io found in /run/user/4201110/containers/auth.json
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching registry.redhat.io found in /home/zzlotnik/.config/containers/auth.json
DEBU[0000] Found credentials for registry.redhat.io in credential helper containers-auth.json in file /home/zzlotnik/.docker/config.json
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: POST URI: http://d/v5.6.2/libpod/artifacts/quay.io%2Fzzlotnik%2Ftesting:artifact/push
Error: writing manifest: uploading manifest artifact to quay.io/zzlotnik/testing: unauthorized: access to the requested resource is not authorized
DEBU[0000] Shutting down engines
```

It found the `/home/zzlotnik/.docker/config.json` file and found Quay.io credentials in there, but I know they're not the correct credentials for this particular org/repo. If I move that file elsewhere and try again, I get the following output instead:

```
$ podman --log-level=trace artifact push --authfile "$HOME/path/to/authfile" quay.io/zzlotnik/testing:artifact
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level trace
DEBU[0000] Called push.PersistentPreRunE(podman --log-level=trace artifact push --authfile /home/zzlotnik/path/to/authfile quay.io/zzlotnik/testing:artifact)
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: GET URI: http://d/v5.6.2/libpod/_ping
DEBU[0000] Loading registries configuration "/etc/containers/registries.conf"
DEBU[0000] Loading registries configuration "/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf"
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: POST URI: http://d/v5.6.2/libpod/artifacts/quay.io%2Fzzlotnik%2Ftesting:artifact/push
Error: writing manifest: uploading manifest artifact to quay.io/zzlotnik/testing: unauthorized: access to the requested resource is not authorized
DEBU[0000] Shutting down engines
```

### Describe the results you expected

I was expecting that Podman would allow me to use the `--authfile` flag to provide an alternative push secret, but it seems like it didn't even try to use it, let alone locate it. If I try the same thing with `podman push` and a small scratch image, it finds the supplied credentials and pushes the image as expected:

```
$ podman --log-level=trace push --authfile "/path/to/authfile" quay.io/zzlotnik/testing:scratch
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level trace
DEBU[0000] Called push.PersistentPreRunE(podman --log-level=trace push --authfile /home/zzlotnik/path/to/authfile quay.io/zzlotnik/testing:scratch)
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: GET URI: http://d/v5.6.2/libpod/_ping
DEBU[0000] Loading registries configuration "/etc/containers/registries.conf"
DEBU[0000] Loading registries configuration "/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf"
DEBU[0000] Found credentials for quay.io in credential helper containers-auth.json in file /home/zzlotnik/path/to/authfile
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: POST URI: http://d/v5.6.2/libpod/images/quay.io/zzlotnik/testing:scratch/push
Getting image source signatures
Copying config sha256:592db74bc3d727dd271af54a0e4a8b595df8036c4d6036e7b80586262775429a
Writing manifest to image destination
DEBU[0001] Called push.PersistentPostRunE(podman --log-level=trace push --authfile /home/zzlotnik/path/to/authfile quay.io/zzlotnik/testing:scratch)
DEBU[0001] Shutting down engines
```

### Podman in a container

Yes

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

I indicated that I am running Podman in a container, which is sort of true. I'm using podman-remote from within a Toolbx image to my host via the user podman socket. For the most part, this works very well for my usual usage patterns. My Toolbx is based on Fedora 43 and my host is currently running Fedora 42 (I will upgrade soon).

My Toolbx image:
```
$ cat /etc/os-release
NAME="Fedora Linux"
VERSION="43 (Toolbx Container Image)"
RELEASE_TYPE=stable
ID=fedora

VERSION_CODENAME=""

```

```

Both podman and podman-remote binaries are built from the same Git tag, albeit with different versions of the Go toolchain:
```

Built:        Mon Sep 29 20:00:00 2025
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

DEBU[0000] Shutting down engines
INFO[0000] Received shutdown.Stop(), terminating!        PID=2580147
```

I'm happy to provide any additional information or context, if needed that might help debug things further.

comments.body:
I found where the problem is. The `Authfile` is not added in the push options here:

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/020a59732a94ea3d41d522aea8c524ec9c77af5e/pkg/domain/infra/tunnel/artifact.go#L66-L73

It is also missing for the pull operation:

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/020a59732a94ea3d41d522aea8c524ec9c77af5e/pkg/domain/infra/tunnel/artifact.go#L37-L44
Wow, that was fast! Nice find and fix!
